task:
Audit the following HTML for WCAG 2.2 Level AA compliance and provide a prioritised list of violations with fixes: ```html
About Us
Submit
```
expect: Identifies missing alt text on the img element
Flags insufficient colour contrast (light grey on white)
Notes the div-as-link is not keyboard accessible (needs <a> or role/tabindex)
Identifies the missing form label (placeholder is not a label)
Flags the div-as-button is not keyboard accessible (needs <button>)
Provides specific code fixes for each violation with WCAG criterion numbers

task: A React modal component opens when a button is clicked but users report they cannot close it with the keyboard, and screen reader users say focus gets lost behind the modal. Diagnose the issues and provide a fully accessible modal implementation.
expect: Identifies need for focus trap inside the modal
Specifies Escape key handler to close the modal
Requires focus to move into the modal on open
Requires focus to return to trigger element on close
Provides working code example with all fixes

task: Our e-commerce site just received a demand letter about ADA non-compliance. The site has: custom dropdown menus that only work with mouse hover, a checkout form with error messages shown only as red borders, auto-playing background video on the homepage, and no skip navigation. Create a remediation plan prioritised by legal risk and user impact.
expect: Prioritises by user impact: keyboard-inaccessible dropdowns and missing error text are highest
Addresses auto-playing video (needs controls or removal)
Provides ARIA patterns for accessible dropdown menus
Recommends form error messages with aria-describedby
Structures remediation as a phased plan with effort estimates
